meta_title: All In One | Best Browser Extension for Productivity
meta_desc: Upgrade your workflow with the All In One extension. An optimized tool for developers and creators seeking maximum productivity without distractions.
mobile_desc: Desktop browser extensions do not work on phones. Send yourself a link and install it on your PC.
hero_desc: Upgrade your workflow with the All In One extension. Designed for developers and creators who want maximum productivity without the clutter.
sn_desc:
Everything you need, one click away.
Automation that thinks for you.
sn_placeholder: Select text and click the text button to add...
wt_desc:
Analyze where you spend your time.
Smart tracking of every second on the web.
pm_desc:
Turn the web into your playground.
Draw, write, and move elements without limits.
fc_desc:
Time is money.
Save 80% of editing time with a single click.
ta_c1_d: Precise tools for design and quick element inspection.
ta_c2_d: Deep insight into technologies and express cache clearing.
ta_c3_d: Maximum focus with music and precise time measurement.
ta_c4_d: Internet without barriers, ads, and visual chaos.
gf_desc: All tools are designed for maximum speed and ease, providing you full power without slowing down your browser.
gf_1_d: Listen to your favorite radio directly from the extension. Play and pause without opening new tabs.
gf_2_d: Boost volume on any tab up to an incredible 1000%. Far beyond the standard limit.
gf_3_d: Click anywhere on the page to extract and automatically copy the exact HEX color code.
gf_4_d: Force dark mode on any site. Smart color inversion protects your eyes during night work.
gf_5_d: Activate the interactive ruler and precisely measure the dimensions of every element on the site in pixels.
gf_6_d: Turn on the option and bypass the right click or text selection block on protected sites.
gf_7_d: Draw, highlight, write, move, and erase marks directly on the screen. Great tool for video presentations.
gf_8_d: Find out in one click what the site is built with and analyze its background structures.
gf_9_d: Clear cache and cookies for the current site in one click and automatically hide annoying cookie consent popups.
gf_10_d: Hover over any text on the site to instantly find out exactly which font is being used.
gf_11_d: Easily and quickly count selected characters and words. Ideal for writing SEO titles and descriptions.
gf_12_d: Record important moments during a live stream with one shortcut. The automatic stopwatch saves hours in editing.
gf_13_d: Write down important ideas! Supports smart math solving in text and easy insertion of current time.
gf_14_d: Automatically track the exact time you spend on different domains. Analyze your usage statistics.
gf_15_d: Returns the visibility of the dislike counter under videos, works directly and automatically on YouTube.
tl_1_d: Install directly from the Chrome Web Store and use in Chrome, Edge, Brave, and Opera browsers. It's completely free and ad free.
tl_2_d: Click the puzzle icon in the top right corner and pin All In One to make it quickly accessible.
tl_3_d: Click our icon anytime and choose the tool you need. Everything in one click. No ads. No popups.
tm_desc: Join users who have already optimized their work and saved time with All In One. Check out their experiences.
cta_desc:
Join users who already save hours every month.
All In One is a completely free tool that is constantly improving.

priv_sec_intro_desc: All In One is an extension developed by Milan Web Portal. We highly value your privacy and are committed to protecting all information that may be processed through our add-on.
priv_sec_data_desc: Our extension is designed based on the principle of local data processing. This means the following:
priv_sec_data_li1: We do not collect any personal data or identity information.
priv_sec_data_li2: Notes, time tracking statistics, and all settings are stored exclusively locally on your device.
priv_sec_data_li3: We have no access to your browsing history, passwords, or private sessions.
priv_sec_data_li4: Milan Web Portal will never sell, rent, or share your data with third parties.
priv_sec_data_li5: All data stored locally will be permanently deleted if you decide to remove the extension.
priv_sec_analytics_desc: In version 1.5, we introduced improvements to ensure a better user experience globally:
priv_sec_analytics_li1: The extension automatically detects your browser language to display one of the 55 supported languages. This process is completely private and sends no data outside your device.
priv_sec_analytics_li2: We use Google Analytics 4 (GA4) to collect anonymous statistics on feature usage. This data is strictly technical and is used to optimize the stability and performance of the tool.
priv_sec_external_li1: The "YouTube Dislike" option uses the public API of the Return YouTube Dislike service.
priv_sec_external_li2: The Radio IN feature streams audio directly from the official radio server with permission.
priv_sec_external_li3: No personal data is forwarded to these services.
priv_sec_permissions_desc: Permissions like "scripting" and "all_urls" are used exclusively for features such as Dark Mode, Ruler, and Enable Copy. All actions are executed within your browser without external communication.
priv_sec_changes_desc: We reserve the right to periodically update this policy to reflect new features or legal regulations. All changes become effective as soon as they are published on this page.
priv_sec_questions_desc: If you have any doubts, feel free to contact us.
